hero.sub: Quotes, jobs, invoices and customers — all in one place. Up and running in 5 minutes.
hero.noCredit: No credit card · Free to start · Danish support

problem.label: Sound familiar?
problem.headline: The paperwork isn't worth carrying around.
problem.p1Body: You lose track of materials, forget hours, and send invoices with wrong totals. It costs you money.
problem.p2Body: You sent the invoice 3 weeks after the job. The customer has forgotten. Reminders feel awkward. Money waits.
problem.p3Body: 3 apps, 2 binders, 1 cluttered inbox. You don't know what needs payment, who you owe a quote, or when the job ends.

jobs.label: Jobs
jobs.headline: All jobs. Complete overview.
jobs.b1: Create and schedule jobs in under 30 seconds
jobs.b3: Upload photos directly from the job site

quotes.label: Quotes
quotes.headline: A quote in 45 seconds.
quotes.b1: Pre-filled line items from your materials library
quotes.b2: Send directly to the customer — they accept with one click

invoices.label: Invoices
invoices.headline: From job to paid — automatically.
invoices.b1: Professional PDF invoices with your logo

customers.label: Customers
customers.headline: Know your customer. Remember everything.
customers.b1: CVR lookup fills company and address automatically
customers.b3: See exactly what a customer owes you

demo.label: See it in practice
demo.headline: From call to payment.
demo.s0desc: Customer calls. You create the job in 20 seconds.
demo.s1desc: Quote generated and sent directly from your phone.
demo.s2desc: Customer approves with one click. You get notified.
demo.s3desc: Photos, notes and material usage logged on site.
demo.s4desc: Invoice generated automatically from the job. Sent with PDF.
demo.s5desc: Payment received. Books closed. On to the next.

who.label: Who it's for
who.headline: Built for those who build Denmark.
who.quote: I used Sunday evenings for invoices. Now it takes me ten minutes on Friday from the job site.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.headline: What tradespeople say.
testimonials.t1quote: I sent my first invoice from the job site. The customer paid the same day. Never done it faster.
testimonials.t2quote: Quotes took an hour in Word. Now they're done in 5 minutes and look ten times more professional.
testimonials.t3quote: Reminders send themselves. I received 3 payments that week I otherwise would have forgotten to follow up on.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.headline: Simple prices. No surprises.
pricing.noBinding: No commitment · Cancel anytime · Data always exportable

faq.label: FAQ
faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.q0: Is it safe to store my customer data here?
faq.a0: Yes. We use encrypted storage and comply with GDPR. Your data is stored on European servers and is never shared with third parties.
faq.a1: Not at all. Håndværk Pro is built for people who work with their hands — not computers. You'll be up and running in under 5 minutes.
faq.q2: What happens to my data if I stop?
faq.a2: You can export all your customers, jobs, invoices and quotes as CSV at any time. We never own your data.
faq.q3: Do the invoices comply with the Bookkeeping Act?
faq.a3: Yes. Our invoices include CVR number, EAN, VAT specification and all fields required under Danish bookkeeping law.
faq.q4: Can I use it on my phone at the job site?
faq.a4: Yes — that's the primary use case. The app is built mobile-first. Create jobs, take photos and send invoices directly from the site.
faq.q5: What's the difference between Free and Solo?
faq.a5: Free gives up to 10 active jobs and basic features. Solo removes the limit, adds your own logo on PDF, automatic reminders and materials library.
faq.q6: Can I import my existing customers?
faq.a6: Yes, you can import customers via CSV file. We're also working on direct import from Billy and e-conomic.
faq.q7: What does it cost to stop?
faq.a7: Nothing. You only pay for active months. You can cancel at any time, and your account remains active until the end of the period.
